news.t: USMC: Bigger is Better with This Mega-Cap ETF

holdings.infoBox: USMC is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.85%, Micron Technology at 7.77%, Apple at 6.89%, Alphabet at 6.08%, and Broadcom at 4.78%.

overview.description: The Principal U.S. Mega-Cap ETF (USMC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to offer exposure to the largest of the US large-cap segment. The fund uses a proprietary, quantitative model to construct the portfolio. USMC was launched on Oct 12, 2017 and is issued by Principal.

data.title: USMC: Bigger is Better with This Mega-Cap ETF
data.text: The Principal U.S. Mega-Cap ETF (NASDAQ:USMC) believes that bigger is better, as it invests in the largest S&P 500 (SPX) companies. Is this a viable strategy and worth a look…

data.title: Final Trades: CVS, AbbVie, Delta Air Lines & more
data.text: The "Halftime Report" traders give their top picks to watch for the second half.
